title: Senior Financial Analyst - Instamojo International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Instamojo International Enterprises - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Instamojo International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Senior Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Jodhpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Instamojo International Enterprises:
Instamojo International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Instamojo International Enterprises!
